content.en:
The years passed.

Ye Tian gradually comprehended some mysteries from this ruin, and had more understanding of the integration of body, will, and innate eternal rules, as well as more understanding of the Eternal Force.

In fact, the power in the ruins is the more complete Eternal Force.

Ye Tian estimated that he had been here for a little more time, and he was completely sure that he would be able to impact the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm.

In this way, Ye Tian cultivated for 30,000 eternal years in the ruins.

this day.

Ye Tian felt that it was almost over, and began to attack the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm.

I saw that he had mobilized the power of the Eternal Heart.A large amount of Eternal Force filled his body, and his body seemed to have completely fused with his will and innate eternal rules, but in fact, there were still some places in the underworld that had not been completely fused.

Bang!!!!

The endless innate eternal rules were vibrating, and with the almost infinite will, the body was constantly vibrating, and finally the slightest place that had never been fused was presented.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian forcibly fused the last trace of his body with his will and the innate eternal rules.

Finally, the last shackles were forcibly broken.

Immediately, Ye Tian's body began to transform, and his breath became complete.

In the ruins, many legendary lords looked at Ye 113 Tian.

"The Endless Lord has broken through!"

"It hasn't been long since the Endless Lord joined our True Saintless Land, and it has only been tens of thousands of eternal years since he entered the Ruins, and he broke the shackles and was promoted to the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm, I have been in the Ruins for 300,000 eternity, and I still haven't broken through!"

"The Endless Lord is worthy of becoming a demon of the Heavenly Rank Holy Son level as soon as he joins the True Saintless Holy Land!"

......

On a certain path, the Silver Moon Lord also paused his meditation and looked at Ye Tian, his eyes full of frustration

She had touched the threshold of the Consummation Realm earlier than Ye Tian, and had even cultivated to stay at the peak of the Initial Realm for a long time, the last time she saw Ye Tian, Ye Tiancai was in the seventh step of the Initial Realm Legendary Lord.

But now, Ye Tian actually stepped into the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm one step ahead of her.

This kind of cultivation speed is beyond her reach.

However, she quickly adjusted her mentality and continued to comprehend, striving to break the shackles as soon as possible and be promoted to the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm.

Time passed, Ye Tian completely stabilized the realm, and left Guiru.

After breaking through to the Consummation Realm Legendary Lord, Ye Tian's true combat power was already comparable to that of an ordinary domain-level Legendary Lord, and if he encountered those Domain-level Legendary Lords who did not yet have an Eternal Treasure, he could even suppress or even suppress the other party

The cultivation after becoming a Legendary Lord is to continuously fuse the Divine Will and the Innate Eternal Rules, and when they are fused to a certain extent, they can form the Domain of Will Rules, and then they can become the Legendary Lord of the Realm Realm!

Ye Tian muttered.

Integrating the will and the innate eternal rules seems simple, but if you want to condense to the level of the will rule realm, it is not simple.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the fourth-order eternal will was not enough to condense the volition rule realm at all, and it was necessary to reach the fifth-order will.

And the innate eternal rules also have relative requirements, and a person's mastery of the innate eternal rules lies in the eternal way.

Only when one Eternal Path is consummated, or three Eternal Paths are completed, can the innate eternal rules be guaranteed to meet the standards.

However, the consummation of an eternal path is very difficult, and it is also very difficult to attain the fifth-order eternal will.

Ye Tian's current Eternal Will was still some distance away from the Fifth Order Eternal Will, so he would not be able to be promoted to the Realm Realm Legendary Lord in a short period of time.

In the Infinite Sea, any Realm Legendary Lord has cultivated for an infinite eternity, and the years of cultivation are even longer than the time when the Source Sea was born.

Therefore, it is still very difficult to become a Realm Legendary Lord.

Source Sea.

Ye Tian was practicing, and one day, the Lord of Ice Han and the Lord of the Holy Peak came to visit.

Ye Tian entertained the two and began to chat.

At this time, Ye Tian obviously felt that the expressions of the Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord were a little solemn, as if something big had happened.

"Lord Binghan, Lord of the Holy Peak, do you have something to do?"

Ye Tian asked casually.

At this time, Lord Ice Han spoke, "Endless Lord, we have a great opportunity to tell you. "

"A great opportunity?"

Ye Tian was quite puzzled, he didn't know what great opportunity the Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord they had, and if there was really a great opportunity, would they tell him?

Lord Binghan continued: "In the Source Sea, the Holy Peak Lord is the first Legendary Lord to break through, while I am the second, and the Lord of the Taihuang is the third. But in fact, after my breakthrough, for a long time, no Legendary Lord was born, so some of the things that happened before that were not known to the later Legendary Lords and other Eternal Realms. "

The Holy Peak Lord continued: "The Endless Lord should know the structure of the Infinite Sea, the resources of the Infinite Sea are concentrated in the Infinite Sea, while the resources of the Source Sea are concentrated in the space-time territory. There may be some Eternal Seas in this situation, but in fact, a long time ago, the Source Sea did not have a space-time territory, but the same situation as the Immeasurable Sea. At that time, the Eternal Realm was all in the Source Sea, and Lord Ice and I were actually Legendary Lords who had achieved within the Source Sea. "

"What, you are the legendary lords who have been achieved within the Source Sea?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He really didn't know this secret.

He had always thought that several legendary lords of the Source Sea were creatures of the space-time territory, but now that he heard what the Lord of Ice Han and the Lord of the Holy Peak said, he knew that this was not the case.

So why did Yuanhai become like this?

The Holy Peak Lord continued: "A long time ago, everything was normal in the Source Sea, but one day, a stone statue appeared in the Source Sea, and this stone statue was not complete, and there was a crack in the body. This stone statue was very large, bigger than a space-time territory, and the moment it appeared, all the creatures of the billions of realms were annihilated, and even ordinary Eternal Realm lords who approached it would be killed by a force. Its appearance caused a concussion in the source sea origin, and that time we saw the scene of the source sea origin suppressing an item with all its might. In the following picture, you can probably guess that the rules of the source sea have changed, and some source sea origin fragments have burst out into the void area outside the source sea, turning into space-time territories. After that, the origin of the source sea seems to be afraid of that stone statue, causing the power to continue to escape to the space-time territory, so that a large number of resources are born in the space-time territory, but there are very few resources in the source sea. At that time, Lord Binghan and I were both in the nine-step Immortal Realm Lord realm, and we were still attacking the Legendary Realm Lord. We ventured close to that statue and found that cultivation had become easier, and we had also found something good, thus breaking the shackles and being promoted to the Legendary Realm Lord, and after the stone statue was hidden, we couldn't find it. None of the later generations knew about this matter, and we didn't tell the later Legendary Lords. But not long ago, we went to explore the place in the source sea, and once again felt the fluctuations of the stone statue, and now the fluctuations are getting stronger and stronger. "

Lord Binghan also said: "During this period of time, we have also inquired about the news in the Infinite Sea to see if we can find a little news about that stone statue, and we really found a little news. If we weren't mistaken, it would have been called the Grey Mist Statue, which once appeared in an Eternal Sea, but then vanished. "

After listening to their words, Ye Tian roughly knew what they were thinking.

The Gray Mist Stone Statue is definitely about to be born, and the two of them can't hide it, worried that the True Fogless Land will directly occupy the Gray Mist Stone Statue at that time, so they are the first to reveal that in this way, the True No Holy Land or Ye Tian will not let them enter again.

"Don't worry, I'll definitely let you in, take me to see it now!"

Ye Tian said.

After receiving Ye Tian's assurance, the Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord breathed a sigh of relief.

Immediately, the two of them took Ye Tian to a place in Yuanhai. _
